description: ezsales.ai is an AI-powered tool that exports leads from LinkedIn Sales Navigator, retrieves verified contact details, and generates personalized cold emails for sales teams.
tagline: AI-powered LinkedIn lead scraper and outreach
overview: ezsales.ai simplifies sales pipeline building by combining LinkedIn Sales Navigator lead exports with accurate contact retrieval and AI-generated personalized outreach emails. Sales teams can move from targeted prospect identification to ready-to-send email copy in a single workflow, reducing manual effort at each stage of prospecting.
what_is: Ezsales AI is a sales prospecting tool that sits within the sales automation and data enrichment categories. It streamlines the path from LinkedIn lead discovery to email outreach by handling three tasks in sequence: exporting targeted leads from LinkedIn Sales Navigator, retrieving accurate and verified contact information for those leads, and generating AI-written personalized emails tailored to each prospect. The combination of these steps in one tool shortens the time between identifying a target and reaching out.

The platform delivers the most value when a sales team wants to grow its pipeline using LinkedIn as a primary prospecting source. Automation of lead exports and contact lookup accelerates the top of the funnel, and AI-drafted emails reduce the writing burden on individual reps. Teams can start seeing pipeline activity quickly after setup because the tool handles the time-consuming manual steps that typically slow outbound prospecting.

Ezsales AI is not a full CRM or marketing automation platform. Its scope is limited to lead export, contact verification, and email personalization for sales teams, so it works best as an input layer that feeds contacts and copy into a broader outreach or CRM workflow rather than replacing one.
